description_long: This object is a stylized sword featuring a straight, double-edged black blade with a pointed tip. The hilt is composed of a blue, cylindrical handle with subtle ridges for grip, capped by a dark pommel. The crossguard is also blue, curving slightly downward and outward, providing hand protection and visual distinction. A thin gold band separates the blade from the hilt, adding a touch of contrast and elegance. The overall design is sleek and modern, with a focus on bold color contrasts and clean lines. The sword appears to be constructed primarily from metal, with possible synthetic or polymer elements in the handle.
description: A sleek, modern sword with a straight black blade, blue crossguard and handle, and gold accent at the hilt.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full length of the straight black blade, blue crossguard, and handle with gold accent.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thinness of the blade and the cylindrical shape of the blue handle.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, displaying the blade, crossguard, and handle from the opposite side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again emphasizing the blade's slim profile and the handle's symmetry.
attribute_handle_design: cylindrical, blue, ridged grip, capped pommel
